title: How to extract cyanobacterial genome
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"73q7s","text":"This protocol describes how to extract cyanobacterial genomes. The main treatments are carried out by sodium iodide, lysozyme, proteinase K and SDS.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"30oni","text":"Extraction Buffer (120 mM NaCl, 50 mM EDTA, pH 8.0)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e62of","text":"Extraction Buffer with Lisozyme (extraction buffer and 10 mg/mL lysozyme)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6l61t","text":"Proteinase K solution (20 mg/mL)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"elsss","text":"Saturated NaI solution","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f051o","text":"10% SDS solution (w/v)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f6oe7","text":"PCI (phenol/chloroform/isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1))","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4o72s","text":"RNaseA solution (20 mg/mL)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4i83r","text":"Isopropanol","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"at9g5","text":"70% ethanol","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"12tm8","text":"Cyanobacteria culture","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8cpgr","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Centrifuge the cyanobacteria culture at 16,000 x g for 10 minutes and remove the supernatant.
Add 400 µL of Extraction Buffer and 100 µL of Saturated NaI Solution to the pellet, and mix well.
Incubate at 37°C for 30 minutes.
Centrifuge at 177,000 x g for 5 minutes and remove the supernatant.
Add 100 µL of Extraction Buffer to the pellet and mix. Then centrifuge at 177,000 x g for 5 minutes and remove the supernatant.
Add 500 µL of Extraction Buffer with Lysozyme to the pellet and mix.
Incubate at 37°C for 2 hours.
Add 5 µL of Proteinase K Solution and 15 µL of SDS, and mix.
Incubate at 37°C overnight.
Add 125 µL of SDS, and mix.
Incubate at 37°C for more than 3 hours.
Add an equal volume of PCI and gently rotate for 5 minutes.
Centrifuge at 4,000 rpm for 10 minutes at room temperature, and transfer the supernatant to a new tube.
Add 3 µL of RNase A, and mix.
Incubate at 37°C for 30 minutes.
Repeat steps 12 and 13.
Add isopropanol in more than equal volume and mix.
Centrifuge at 16,000 x g for 1 minute at 4°C and remove the supernatant.
Repeat steps 17 and 18, replacing isopropanol with 70% ethanol.
Air-dry the pellet and resuspend in distilled water.
creator: Leonardo Ken Okumura
